mapper.select: SELECT DATE (update_time) AS day, SUM(play_count) AS count FROM video_stat WHERE update_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE (update_time);

SELECT m.name AS name, m.cid AS category, s.play_count AS views FROM video_stat s LEFT JOIN sys_movie m ON m.id = s.video_id WHERE s.is_deleted = 0 AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.play_count DESC LIMIT 5
